query:
SELECT 
  pv.id as variantId,
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.variantName,
  vm.id as materialId,
  vm.sortOrder,
  vm.materialType,
  mc.colorCode,
  mc.colorName
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN variant_materials vm ON pv.id = vm.variantId
LEFT JOIN material_colors mc ON vm.materialColorId = mc.id
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V019'
ORDER BY vm.sortOrder;
